spec_match.rationale: The page demonstrates the UA-CH platformVersion read for macOS and now includes synthetic Windows and Linux samples that show why non-macOS values are not parsed as macOS versions.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the synthetic platform selector and version input update verdicts for Windows and macOS 12.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still centers on Chrome 151's macOS 13 minimum while giving non-macOS visitors a meaningful branch.

edge_cases.rationale: The previous non-macOS platformVersion-shape gap is now covered by Windows and Linux sample inputs.

design_system.rationale: The added controls use CSS variables, associated labels, and existing page styling.

summary: Re-tested in Chrome Canary through chrome-devtools-mcp at /v151/chrome-will-remove-support-for-macos-12/deprecation-demo/: Windows 15.0.0 reported that the macOS removal does not apply, macOS 12.7.4 reported the Chrome 151 upgrade warning, and console/network output was clean.
